instructions.instruction: Always include `nxViteTsPaths()` in the plugins array of every vite.config.ts in an Nx monorepo to ensure workspace path aliases resolve correctly.
instructions.relevant_when: Creating or updating a vite.config.ts for any project in an Nx workspace.
instructions.why_given: The skill marks omitting nxViteTsPaths() as a hard anti-pattern and requires it in all Nx monorepo Vite configs.

instructions.instruction: Always set `root: __dirname` in vite.config.ts and compute cacheDir and outDir relative to the workspace root using the correct number of `../` segments.
instructions.relevant_when: Configuring paths in a vite.config.ts for an Nx project.
instructions.why_given: The skill requires root: __dirname as a hard constraint and provides the path-depth rule for outDir/cacheDir to avoid Nx caching inconsistencies.

instructions.instruction: When configuring a library mode build, always declare rollupOptions.external listing peer dependencies and org-scoped packages to prevent bundling them.
instructions.relevant_when: Setting up vite.config.ts for an Nx library that will be published or consumed by other projects.
instructions.why_given: The skill prohibits bundling all dependencies in library mode and requires explicit externalization.

instructions.instruction: Configure Vitest test.cache.dir and test.coverage.reportsDirectory using workspace-root-relative paths, not project-relative paths like ./coverage.
instructions.relevant_when: Adding Vitest configuration to a vite.config.ts in an Nx workspace.
instructions.why_given: The skill explicitly shows the bad (./coverage) vs good ({workspaceRoot}-relative) pattern and requires the workspace-relative form.

instructions.instruction: Add vite-plugin-dts with entryRoot and tsConfigFilePath options when building a TypeScript library in Nx with Vite to generate type declarations.
instructions.relevant_when: Setting up a publishable Nx library that uses Vite for building.
instructions.why_given: The skill covers DTS plugin setup as a required step for library mode with TypeScript.
